subject: Electrode, a spherical Pokemon resembling an inverted Pokeball with a simple face, floating amid storm clouds and electric energy
description: A large perfect sphere with a simple expressive face — dark circular eyes and a line forming a slight smile — dominates the frame. The sphere is divided horizontally: white above the equator, red below. It floats within a dynamic sky scene filled with billowing white and blue-grey storm clouds and crackling electric energy. The background swirls with atmospheric turbulence, giving the impression of the creature hovering in a charged storm system. The mood is light despite the electric theme — the creature's face reads as content or smug.
foreground: large red-and-white sphere with simple face, floating
background: swirling storm clouds with electric energy, blue-grey sky
emotion: smug or content expression, simple face
